title: Preload with dynamic query and post-preload sort
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.user_with_recent_active_posts/2` that takes a `user_id` and a `cutoff_datetime`. Returns the User with preloaded `:posts` filtered to `inserted_at > cutoff_datetime`, ordered by `published_at desc`. Use query-tuple preload: `preload: [posts: ^posts_query]` where posts_query is parameterized by the cutoff. Pin BOTH `user_id` and `cutoff_datetime`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Building a dynamic preload query with pinned params and threading it through a query-tuple preload. Rare combination.
